cases.input: Can I top up using my car?

I am chatting about an order from a long while back.  I never got it to this day and am deeply upset by this!  I want all of my money back!  I just can not accept paying for something I never got.

Why didn't my transfer go through?
How old do you have to be to be able to open an account?

I need the right foreign money, at the right rate, at ATMs, when I go abroad.
A wrong exchange rate was applied to a transaction made abroad.
Can someone assist me with the details explaining which fiat currencies that you support?
Why do I have to verify the top-up that I started?
Is there a verification code for top-ups?
How long will this card payment stay pending?

Hey I tried to get some money out earlier but the machine didn't work. Now just saw the transaction still seems in progress! Can you please check what's going there, seems something is broken, I don't want to be charged for money that I haven't actually received!
Tell me which cards and what currency is supported.
For some reason my account's been charged an extra dollar.
dont understand why transfer failed
Can you assist me with unblocking my PIN? I put it in wrong too many times.
Since my id hasn't been verified, when can I use my account?
I want a refund for my purchase
It didnt work when I tried to pay contactless at the bus today. Why?

Hi,  Please help me, as i have transferred some amount but receiver did not get the same amount. He received a bit less. Due to this again i need to transfer the difference.   I have transferred money but beneficiary's account is credited with less amount. Now i have transfer the difference of the amount. I think there is some issue, could you please look into this.
